column1: Hey morgan, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
It's March 17-22. Not sure what dates we'd go for sure yet tho.
Okay cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Word yea thats where I'll be too. how many ppl in your group so far?
Thats solid, you all from the same school? ill hook it up with a good group rate
Oh bet! we got a couple groups from your school that came in
heard y'all know how to party fs lol
i'll put some info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
I guess quick enough where there is still availability. I just want to make sure everyone can afford it before getting too deep into it
yea I feel you on that! punta cana is pretty affordable for the most part
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Liked “is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text”
whats the best email to send to?
word just sent that over did it come through?
hey I just sent over the updated dates too for the 17th to 22nd, pricing is all he same
Okay perfect thank you. I'll get back to you
Do we all pay separately? Is that an option. Or does one person have to pay it in whole
nope! everyone can create their own account and hop on and make their own payments
so you don't have to worry about the headache of doing it for everyone lol
heyy Morgan what's up, how's everyone feelin?
We're all in! Can you text or email me how all of us make an account to pay and still be on the same reservation
hey, yea lets do it! ill send it all over in a few mins. illl both email it and text it
the email will have a deeper step by step breakdown on navigate through and get situated
hey not sure if you saw the email with the reservation! here it is https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/DAWWHQELHX
Is it any cheaper to book flights through you guys?
Also wondering if some people on the reservation can do five nights and some can do 4 nights?
honestly its cheaper to get separately on your own. I can help you find a good one to grab though. what are some good airport options for you?
and how many wanna do 4 nights vs 5 nights?
We'd prefer to fly out of Lexington, but close options are Louisville and Cincinnati
And two want 4 and two want 5. It's just 4 of us now
okay. we can do that yea no prob
yea Lexington looks a little pricey tbh
heres a decent one out of lousiville, $627 american https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/zShFvrMqHv32KErM7
cinnci is a little more expensive than louisville too
Okay I think Louisville one looks good. You think 45 min layover will be enough tho?
Also, do we need a new reservation if we're checking out on different days
I think the layover will be fine
and yea ill jut have to send another link for the 4 night
Will we get to stay in the same room? And will the price change since there will only be two people in the room for the extra night?
checking in on the best plan of action now. it may be easiest to do all one room, and then the two staying for the extra night will pay for an extra night
Hey morning, so it's lookin like we'll have to set the reservation up as two reservations. Just so that you each get the correct days and pay the correct amounts. I'll work on that in a few!
When you check in at the resort, you can request to combine the room into one, or you could even just all stay in one of the rooms together. It'll all cost the same either way
Our on site staff will help you get that situated
So are we all still paying around $700 for the room?
On average yes. here are the two options
actually I figured out the best gameplan, this will save you the most $
option 1: there will be one reservation, for 5 nights. the rate will be $749 per person. the two that want to do 4 nights will be able to leave early. this is the cheapest way
option 2: we do two separate reservations with two rooms. the 4 night will be $676, and the 5 night will be $849
overall, option 1 is def the best. for the people staying the extra night, y'all can figure out amongst eachother how you want to divide who is paying more, etc
How much would it be if we did 4 people for 4 nights? So I can do the math
even cheaper. its 646 per person but I can get it down to 599
So would it be easiest to just book the 5 nights with four people and they can leave early? And pay them the difference? Then we could stick with our original reservation?
id say yes, 5 nights with all 4 ppl, or 4 nights with all 4 people. is the cheapest way
with the 5 night, we can keep the current option 1 reservation I texted over above
But the two that want to leave early can with no issues right?

y'all will be able to hop right in there. yup, the two ppl leaving early, when you get your flights, they'll add in their flight info onto their accounts. and our operations team will see their departure date/time and schedule their pickup
so theyll be fine. and our onsite staff will be there to help
heyy Morgan checkin in, how's everyone feelin?
I just sent everyone the original link
Does the first payment have to be due tomorrow?
Cool. And yea honestly I got operations to push it out, it was initially due Weds
I can pay mine up front but I don't think everyone else was expecting that. But lmk
hey morning! saw you and Kat got situated, was it Ana and Saxton that needed more time for the deposit
Ana paid, not sure if saxton did yet
yea they both did actually. all good! lmk if y'all need anything or have any questions in the meantime
I'm not sure how easy that is but we definitely want to party.
Hey! I've been hearing that Occidental punta Cana isn't a very big party resort... Is that true? If so can we look into switching to riu or occidental caribe??

heyy! Honestly the Punta Cana is the main party resort lol, it used to be the Caribe but it switched over a few years back. We bring a bunch of Djs to the punta cana and host tons of pool/beach parties and also throw down at the on resort club almost every night
if you're looking for a party you're at the right resort lol
Would you be able to book us dinner reservations at the restaurants there? I tried calling three times and they send me to a line that doesn't work
Dinner reservations are only able to be made after you check in
Are we guaranteed two double beds?
yes very rare that they put 4 ppl in a single king
if it was 2 of you, theres potential based on availability
btw is Katherine on the same flight as anyone else in the group?
Can we add the party stuff while we're at the resort if we decide to? Or does it have to be befrlore
You can do it at the resort I'm just not sure what pricing will be
Can you add coco bongo on the 18th and booze cruise the 20th to our reservation please?! For all of us
I'm sorry I'm not seeing how to add that to our reservation
Coco Bongo + Booze cruise, will work on that in a few mins
Awesome. Will that show on our voucher? Or how do we show proof of purchase?
Yea it'll show up on your vouchers! I'll let you know when it's added so you can pay off the balance
Perfect, on the voucher it says it's good for the 17-22nd. Does that mean we can go any of those days?
nah theres specific dates for each event for the week
